highlights.title: Numerical work budgets with explicit contracts
highlights.summary: every chaos-diagnostic entry point (Lyapunov, FTLE, basin and Wada convergence, CLV, RQA, 0-1 test, codimension-two scans, Poincaré sections, event detection, parameter estimation) now validates dt, step counts, horizons, and state f…

highlights.title: FTLE horizons integrate the exact residual time
highlights.summary: (no more full-dt rounding for T < dt), and the maximal singular value of the state-transition matrix comes from a scaled symmetric Jacobi eigensolver, so near-orthogonal power-iteration seeds and overflow/underflow in MᵀM can no long…

highlights.title: Event detection is time-ordered and exact at the cap
highlights.summary: multiple crossings inside one step are refined then sorted by time (not registration order), and hitting maxEvents returns the last refined crossing state instead of the enclosing step end.
